name: Lens Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Lens Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells window touch protective glass panels, touch modules, and window touch protection new materials. It offers window protection glass, touch screen monomer, touch screen module, camera module, fingerprint module, and camera related products, as well as buttons, ceramics, metal parts, and other products. The company's products are used in mobile phones, tablet PCs, notebook computers, digital cameras, players, GPS navigators, automotive instrumentation, smart homes, medical equipment, and other areas. Lens Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Changsha, China.
